gt_sql: SELECT T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#' AND T3.molecule_id = 'TR041'
pred_sql:
SELECT c.atom_id, c.atom_id2 
FROM connected c
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR041' 
  AND b.bond_type = '#';
question: What are the atoms of the triple bond with the molecule "TR041"?
